root_text.sn45.166:1.3: Rāgo khilo, doso khilo, moho khilo—
root_text.sn45.166:1.5: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇannaṁ khilānaṁ abhiññāya pariññāya parikkhayāya pahānāya …pe… ayaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo bhāvetabbo”ti.

translation_text.sn45.166:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these three kinds of barrenness.
translation_text.sn45.166:1.4: These are the three kinds of barrenness.
translation_text.sn45.166:1.5: The noble eightfold path should be developed for the direct knowledge, complete understanding, finishing, and giving up of these three kinds of barrenness.”
